# NFO Test Data

This directory contains test fixtures and sample files for NFO generation testing.

## Files

- `sample_kodi.nfo` - Example of a properly formatted Kodi-compatible NFO file

## Usage

These files can be used in tests for:
- Golden file testing (comparing generated output to expected output)
- XML parsing validation
- Integration test fixtures
- Documentation examples

## Format

All NFO files follow the Kodi NFO specification:
- https://kodi.wiki/view/NFO_files
